text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you put on fake nails when your
real ones are in this condition...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan's toenail is split right down to the
cuticle and discolored a reddish black.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I can run! I can!

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Please don't take this injury lightly just because
it's your toenail.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Every time you race, your legs are strained far
beyond anything humans experience.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of how much shock you absorb with
the balls of your feet, the stress on your toes and
nails is also tremendous.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But can't I just tape them?!

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
What if you push yourself too hard and it gets
infected? Or you injure another part of your body
trying to protect your toes as you run?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't the pain almost too much to bear this
time?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
One unwise choice is all it takes to completely
throw away your future as a racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We fill her prescription just to be safe and leave
the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm going to the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind! I don't care what happens
after that! I'm gonna be in the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise... I'll quit! If I can't run there, then I
might as well just give up for good!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, come on! This is literally a
once-in-a-lifetime opportunity! I'm not gonna
give it up just because of my stupid toenail!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
What? Your toenail split again? ...Well, I guess
you're going to miss the next tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
It's all right. I'm sure you can catch up to the
others if you work extra hard after.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, her toenail split again. This time it was
because she practiced too much.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if there's anything you want to talk about,
just... know that you can confide in me.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Jordan's toenail split again. Yep... it's
hard to recommend her for tryouts at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Teacher B
text_block_list.text:
Oof, yeah... The injury was self-reported too,
right? People talk, and, well, it's hard to know if
the injury's real or not...

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Sigh. I wish she would just tell me if she doesn't feel like running, then I could figure something out with her...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I... I don't want to miss another race!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I've never been any good at studying! I can't do
anything right! My teachers always yell at me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But finally, for once in my life, I was winning! I
thought I could actually be someone! And now...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
My toenail's taken everything from me! Even the
Classics...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
My dreams will never come true! If this keeps up,
I'll...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Agh, I've had it! I'm so sick of this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tears well up in her eyes as her frustration builds.
choice_data_list: Think you can put up with it, then?
Think you can put up with it, then?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I can! It doesn't hurt that bad, honest!
choice_data_list: No, I don't mean the pain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she runs through the pain, it'll only limit her
racing career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if I take that choice away from her, deprive
her of even the possibility, then it'll be her heart
that breaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, she'll need to take better care
of her nails than she has been. I'll also look into
getting special shoes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We need to make her feet our first priority... Then
we can continue training to win.
choice_data_list: You won't have any time for fun.
You won't have any time for fun.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: Are you prepared to put everything into racing?
Are you prepared to put everything into racing?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yes. Of course I am.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make it big! I want to race, no matter
what!
choice_data_list:
I want you to tell me as soon as you feel any
pain.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sorry for keeping quiet about it before.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text: Is she okay?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
I see... That's a relief. Still, if her injury is as
serious as it seems, does that mean the Satsuki
Sho is out of the qu—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask the reporter not to write about what
happened.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that we don't want any strange rumors
going around ahead of the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying... you're going to force her to run
while she's injured?

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
I... can't agree to that. I'm a journalist. If you
really intend to push your trainee to—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No! That's not what's happening! We're going to
make sure my nails are fully healed!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So... please! I'm begging you! Please help us out...
For my Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Very well. I'll keep it to myself for now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: We've gotta bust our butts from now on.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin our days taking care of Tosen
Jordan's feet while preparing for the Satsuki Sho.
